name: get_site_pins
full_help:
get_site_pins

Description: 
Get a list of site_pins.

Syntax: 
get_site_pins  [-of_objects <args>] [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>]
               [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
site_pins

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-of_objects]  Get 'site_pin' objects of these types: 'site xdef_site node 
                 pin net bel_pin'.
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match the 'site_pin' objects against patterns.
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Device, Object, XDC

arguments.description: Get 'site_pin' objects of these types: 'site xdef_site node pin net bel_pin'.
Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
